CustomField.description: Populated when a new Insolvency Account record is created for the Insolvency record. Clients can only see records in this Object if their client identifier value is present in this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Populated when a new Insolvency Account record is created for the Insolvency record. Clients can only see records in this Object if their client identifier value is present in this field.
CustomField.label: Client Identifiers
